items.title: UPDATES: Colts and Day 3 of the NFL Draft
items.summary: PITTSBURGH -- The first two days of the NFL Draft are in the books as teams look ahead to the final day and Rounds 4-7. The Indianapolis Colts started the draft with seven picks. They worked a trade with the Pittsburgh Steelers, swapping picks in the second and seven rounds and picking up a fourth-rounder [...]

items.title: Colts’ Chris Ballard: We got younger, faster on defense
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – The major renovation on defense picked up steam Friday night. After a trade-back with Pittsburgh in round 2 – No. 47 overall to No. 53 – the Indianapolis Colts found Zaire Franklin’s successor at middle linebacker with Georgia’s CJ Allen. In round 3, they invested the 78th overall pick in LSU safety A.J. Haulcy. [...]

items.title: Colts’ defense gets what it needs with Day 2 picks
items.summary: With no first-round pick, Chris Ballard had to focus in and nail his selections. The Indianapolis Colts faded down the stretch and much of the blame falls on the shoulders of an older, slower defense. The idea was to become younger and faster through the draft. When you draft rookies and move on from players […]

items.title: CJ Allen scouting breakdown: A three-down linebacker built for today’s NFL

He is expected to step into Lou Anarumo’s defense next to Akeem Davis-Gaither and compete to replace the role Zaire Franklin held in the middle of the defense. items.title: Sauce Gardner: I’m Colts’ first-round pick (next year, too)
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – Sauce Gardner isn’t buying into the notion that the Indianapolis Colts don’t have a pick in the first round of Thursday night’s NFL Draft. “I’m the first-round pick,’’ he said this week with a smile. Actually, more than that. “I’m the first-round pick two times,’’ Gardner said. This year, and in 2027. That [...]
